<div>?</div>
<ul>
<li>Pistachios</li>
<li>Spinach dip (below)</li>
<li>Chicken (below)</li>
<li>Hot dogs spicy flavor of<br></li>
<li>Frozen French onion soup (2 boxes) usually need to ask for help to find it</li>
<li>Sparkling water raspberry or other flavor no sugar (example below)</li>
<li>Pastramis</li>
</ul>
